title: Typing-stop-on-disconnect in ws.rs: defend this
description: connection_is_typing flag in the relay's WebSocket handler synthesizes a typing_notify{typing:false} notification on abrupt client disconnect. This is correct and non-obvious: without it, peers see a phantom 'is typing...' indicator that never resolves. A future contributor might remove it as 'cleanup' since it's in the disconnect path where things are being torn down. Defend: the typing state is per-connection, not per-session — clients cannot send a stop-typing on disconnect, so the relay must do it.
close_reason: Decision records — informational only, no code change needed
